headline: MetLife Recommends Shareholders Reject "Mini-Tender" Offer by Potemkin Limited
summary: NEW YORK, March 10, 2026--MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET) today announced that it has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer by Potemkin Limited ("Potemkin") to purchase up to 10,000 shares of MetLife, Inc. common stock from MetLife shareholders. The offer is for approximately 0.002 percent of MetLife shares of common stock outstanding as of February 12, 2026. Potemkin’s offer price of $51.60 per share is approximately 27.09 percent lower than the $70.77 closing price of MetLife common st
